symbols: Mary's sorrowful face — the Mater Dolorosa, the sword piercing her soul
description: A close-up detail showing the face of the Virgin Mary from a Pieta composition by Perugino. Her expression is one of deep sorrow, with downcast eyes and delicate features. The painting is rendered with Perugino's characteristic soft modeling and luminous skin tones.
theological_description: Mary's grief at the Pieta fulfills Simeon's prophecy: 'A sword will pierce through your own soul also' (LUK.2.35). Her face embodies the Church's contemplation of the Passion — the cost of salvation written in a mother's tears.

scripture_refs.reason: Simeon's prophecy of the sword piercing Mary's soul
